name: Endoparasitic Vector

topRankStats: Transmit an endoparasite to an enemy within 30m. Tentacles spawn from it, clinging to enemies within 10m slowing them as they move further from the parasite, and dealing 20 <DT_VIRAL_COLOR>Viral Damage/sec over 5s.
